expectations.text: GroupHeaderTemplate shows category name and item count
expectations.evidence:
<Label Grid.Column="0" Text="{Binding CategoryName}" ... />
<Label Grid.Column="1" Text="{Binding ItemCount, StringFormat='{0} items'}" ... />

expectations.text: Price is formatted as currency (StringFormat with C, or similar currency formatting)
An 'Add to Cart' button has a Command binding
expectations.evidence: <Button Grid.Column="2" Text="Add to Cart" ... Command="{Binding Source={RelativeSource AncestorType={x:Type viewmodels:CatalogViewModel}}, Path=AddToCartCommand}" CommandParameter="{Binding}" />

expectations.text: Pull-to-refresh is implemented via RefreshView or IsBusy pattern
CollectionView has an EmptyView defined for the no-results state
expectations.evidence:
<CollectionView.EmptyView>
  <ContentView>
    <VerticalStackLayout ...>
      <Label Text="No products found" ... />
      <Label Text="Pull down to refresh or check back later." ... />
    </VerticalStackLayout>
  </ContentView>
</CollectionView.EmptyView>

expectations.text: ViewModel uses a grouped collection structure (ObservableCollection of group objects)
